overall.description: First-person exploration through a dark, foggy forest at night in a survival horror video game. The player navigates a rocky stream bed before climbing onto the forest floor and proceeding through increasingly dense and dark woodland with heavy atmospheric fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky creek bed with flowing water

agents.ego_description: walking carefully through the shallow rocky stream, navigating between wet stones and flowing water

entered.detail: wet rocky terrain with uneven stones forming a shallow creek bed
shallow water flowing over the rocks in the stream bed
tall evergreen trees lining both sides of the stream banks
large rock formation and boulders along the right bank
thick fog visible in the distance downstream

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow rocky stream bed at night, with the camera moving forward through shallow flowing water. Tall pine trees line the banks on both sides, barely visible in the darkness and fog. The environment is enclosed by rock walls and the dense forest canopy overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest path ascending from creek bank

events.description: climbing up the rocky bank out of the stream onto the grassy forest floor

agents.ego_description: climbing up the rocky bank from the stream and continuing along the grassy forest path between trees

entered.detail: grassy terrain replacing the rocky stream bed as the ground surface
large fallen tree trunk lying on the forest floor
dense low vegetation and shrubs along the forest path

segments.scene_description: The player climbs out of the rocky stream onto a grassy forest bank, transitioning from the water to solid ground. The path continues through moderate forest density with scattered underbrush and fallen logs. The fog remains thick in the distance as the camera moves between pine trees now closer to the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense foggy forest interior with limited visibility

events.description: visibility decreases significantly as the fog thickens and the forest becomes darker

agents.ego_description: navigating carefully through the dense foggy forest with very limited visibility, flashlight illuminating the immediate path

entered.detail: extremely thick fog reducing visibility to just a few meters ahead
dense bushes and low vegetation crowding the forest path

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters the deep forest interior where visibility drops dramatically due to thickening fog and darkness. The path becomes narrower and more enclosed by dense vegetation and closely spaced tree trunks. The atmosphere is increasingly oppressive as the flashlight barely penetrates the heavy mist surrounding the player.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a confined, watery ravine into the open, shadowed expanse of a dense forest. It begins by wading forward through the shallow flowing water of a narrow rocky stream bed, enclosed by steep rock walls and a dark canopy of pine trees. As the camera moves forward, it climbs out of the stream and onto a grassy bank, shifting from the water to solid ground. The scene then expands into a moderately dense woodland, navigating through scattered underbrush and fallen logs while the thick fog persists between the towering pines.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as the environment transitions from a navigable woodland into an oppressive, claustrophobic forest interior. It begins by pushing deeper into the woods, where the surrounding vegetation grows denser and the path becomes increasingly narrow. As the camera advances, the visibility drops dramatically while the heavy mist thickens, causing the flashlight's beam to struggle against the encroaching darkness. The scene finally closes in as the tree trunks crowd closer together, leaving the viewer enveloped in a suffocating atmosphere of fog and shadow.
